Query:
UNLOAD (SELECT bs_per_bldg.geometry_building_type_recs, sum(bs_per_bldg.tract_count) AS sample_count, sum(bs_per_bldg.bldg_weight) AS units_count, sum(ts_aggr._inner_rows) / CAST(count(distinct(ts_aggr.bldg_id)) AS DECIMAL) AS rows_per_sample, sum(ts_aggr.bs__elec_minus_gas * bs_per_bldg.bldg_weight) AS elec_minus_gas FROM (SELECT ts_flat.bldg_id AS bldg_id, sum(ts_flat._v__elec_minus_gas) AS bs__elec_minus_gas, count(*) AS _inner_rows FROM (SELECT resstock_2024_amy2018_release_2_by_state_vu.bldg_id AS bldg_id, resstock_2024_amy2018_release_2_by_state_vu."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption" - resstock_2024_amy2018_release_2_by_state_vu."out.natural_gas.total.energy_consumption" AS _v__elec_minus_gas FROM resstock_2024_amy2018_release_2_by_state_vu WHERE resstock_2024_amy2018_release_2_by_state_vu.upgrade IN (1) AND resstock_2024_amy2018_release_2_by_state_vu.state IN ('CO', 'WY') AND resstock_2024_amy2018_release_2_by_state_vu.bldg_id IN (SELECT bs.bldg_id FROM resstock_2024_amy2018_release_2_metadata AS bs WHERE bs.upgrade IN (1) AND bs.applicability = true GROUP BY bs.bldg_id HAVING count(distinct(bs.upgrade)) = 1)) AS ts_flat GROUP BY ts_flat.bldg_id) AS ts_aggr JOIN (SELECT bs.bldg_id AS bldg_id, bs."in.geometry_building_type_recs" AS geometry_building_type_recs, sum(bs.weight) AS bldg_weight, count(*) AS tract_count FROM resstock_2024_amy2018_release_2_metadata AS bs WHERE bs.upgrade = 0 AND bs."in.state" IN ('CO', 'WY') GROUP BY bs.bldg_id, bs."in.geometry_building_type_recs") AS bs_per_bldg ON bs_per_bldg.bldg_id = ts_aggr.bldg_id GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1) 
 TO 's3://resstock-core/bsq_athena_unload_results/bd6b0895d332e1245df4b96c5fbbf59be9c99b2d4d598a7ecd5b171abdc9cc26/c5aeca4f-65b2-43dc-b191-ee966998bdd6/' 
 WITH (format = 'PARQUET')
